name: Gumbo
recipeIngredient: 1 cup fresh corn kernels, or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté the chopped onion and diced green bell pepper with minced garlic in water until soft.
2. Remove the garlic cloves from the mixture.
3. Add all ingredients to a slow cooker and cook on high for 6 hours or low for 8-10 hours.
4. Serve the gumbo hot. It's ready to enjoy after work, knowing everything is prepared ahead of time. The lima beans can be pre-cooked in the slow cooker overnight, requiring only the addition of remaining ingredients before serving.
